items.claim: Anna Melissano showed poor striking defense and ground skills on The Ultimate Fighter.
items.quote: not only the did the striking defense looked horrible but the the ground game looked very bad.

items.claim: Donnie Barbosa is a legitimate black belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu.
items.quote: Diani Barbosa who is a legit black belt in BJJ

items.claim: Alvin Hines is a very durable fighter.
items.quote: We know how durable Alvin Hines is.

items.claim: RJ Harris has poor striking defense with his chin held high.
items.quote: he has tall man's defense. His shins up in the air. He's very hitable

items.claim: Steuart Little has failed to secure takedowns in his UFC career.
items.quote: he he has not been able to get the fights down to the ground thus far in the UFC

items.claim: Steuart Little went 1 for 20 on takedown attempts against Lucas Roachcha.
items.quote: Steuart Nickel went like 1 for 20 on takedowns.

items.claim: Alden Korea is a slow starter.
items.quote: Korea, you know, one of these guys that trains with Josh Vay, a slow starter type thing.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez is coming off a PED suspension.
items.quote: He's coming off of a peed suspension
the cardio could be a question.
